name: tmux-demo-runner
description: Run tmux-style demo scripts one line or selection at a time from VS Code.

tmuxDemoRunner.target.description: Where plain demo lines are sent. Use tmux for the original presenter workflow or vscodeTerminal for an integrated-terminal fallback.

tmuxDemoRunner.terminalName.description: Name of the VS Code integrated terminal used by the runner.

tmuxDemoRunner.tmuxPane.description: Optional tmux pane target, for example :.+ or %1. Leave empty for the active pane.

tmuxDemoRunner.variablesFile.description: JSON file used for {{name}} substitutions. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace folder, or from the demo file folder when there is no workspace.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && node --check lib/runner.js && node --check bin/tmux-demo-runner
